title: Principal Engineer
description:
**About Helfie:** 




 Helfie is on a mission to redefine global preventative healthcare. We’re pioneering an entirely new operating system for human health – empowering billons with instant, affordable health checks and AI\\-driven insights. Our vision is to build trust, drive organic engagement, and make preventative healthcare a reality for all 8 billion of us.
 



  





 Join us as we revolutionise the healthcare landscape and make early detection and prevention accessible to everyone.
 



  





**About the role:** 




 We are seeking an accomplished and technically exceptional Principal Engineer to join our engineering team at an exciting stage of our company’s growth. This is a senior individual contributor role that carries significant responsibility for technical quality, delivery outcomes, and the professional development of the broader engineering function.
 



  





 The successful candidate will bring extensive experience operating at the principal or staff engineer level within fast\\-paced technology environments, ideally within the health technology or regulated software sector. They will demonstrate a proven ability to lead complex technical initiatives end\\-to\\-end, establish and uphold best practice standards across multiple disciplines, and contribute meaningfully to the growth and capability of those around them.
 



  





 This position requires a professional who is equally comfortable working at the code level and contributing to technical strategy — someone who can provide clear direction, communicate progress with transparency, and consistently align their technical decisions with the broader vision of the organisation. Prior experience in a startup or high\\-growth environment is essential, as the role demands a high degree of adaptability, initiative, and commercial awareness.
 



  





  





**Key responsibilities:** 




  




* Lead the end\\-to\\-end delivery of complex product features and capabilities — from technical design through to production release, monitoring, and iteration — with full ownership of quality, reliability, and outcomes.
* Establish and evolve engineering best practices across a broad range of technical disciplines including system design, API development, testing strategy, CI/CD, observability, and security, setting the standard for the wider team.
* Actively mentor and develop junior and mid\\-level engineers through structured guidance, code review, pair programming, and honest feedback, creating genuine learning opportunities and fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
* Provide proactive and generous technical support to peers across the engineering team — unblocking, advising, and elevating the quality of collaborative work.
* Bring clarity and structure to ambiguous or complex problems, translating technical challenges into clear, actionable paths forward that the team can execute with confidence.
* Communicate proactively and transparently about progress, risks, and decisions to both technical and non\\-technical stakeholders, ensuring alignment and appropriate visibility at all times.
* Maintain a deep understanding of the product vision and organisational direction, ensuring that all technical decisions are made in service of long\\-term goals, not just immediate delivery needs.



  





**Skills \\& experience:** 




  




* 8\\+ years of software engineering experience, with demonstrable experience operating at principal or staff engineer level, including a track record of end\\-to\\-end ownership of complex technical initiatives from design through to production.
* Proven startup or high\\-growth environment experience — this is a non\\-negotiable requirement. The successful candidate will understand the demands of a resource\\-conscious, fast\\-moving organisation and demonstrate the adaptability and initiative that environment requires.
* Deep technical expertise across software architecture, cloud\\-native systems, and production engineering, with the ability to work credibly across a broad range of disciplines and guide others in areas beyond their own specialisation.
* Demonstrated ability to mentor and develop engineers at all levels, with evidence of raising team capability and fostering a culture of quality, learning, and psychological safety.
* Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to translate complex technical concepts for non\\-technical audiences, proactively manage stakeholder expectations, and articulate technical decisions with clarity and confidence. Experience in health technology or regulated software environments is highly regarded.



  





**Equal opportunity statement** 




  





 Helfie.ai is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We will not discriminate on the basis of age, disability, sex, race, religion or belief, gender reassignment, marriage / civil partnership, pregnancy or sexual orientation. We encourage applications from a wide range of candidates and selection for roles will be based on individual merit alone.

title: Senior Principal Software Engineer - Full stack, ITC
description:
**Who You Will Work With**
 You will spend much of your time with Software Engineers in Creation Engineering and adjacent teams. You will also partner closely with other Principal Engineers, Engineering Directors, and Product Managers in both Product Creation and other departments. Joining Product Creation in India means becoming part of a global innovation engine that shapes the future of sport and technology. You’ll contribute to high\\-impact initiatives, collaborate with global teams, and help build the next generation of Nike’s digital product creation capabilities. It’s an opportunity to work at the intersection of passion, performance, and purpose—creating a positive brand image and driving Nike’s mission forward.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 Join Nike’s India Technology Center (ITC) as Senior Principal Engineer, Product Creation. Product Creation is the technology powerhouse behind Nike’s product creation ecosystem driving digital transformation across Footwear, Apparel, and Accessories. In this role, you will to solve complex software engineering problems supporting Nike’s pursuit of delivering state of the art tools to our product developers and broader creation community. You will need to be highly collaborative with peers, productive in a fast\\-paced development environment and have depth of native cloud software engineering experience.
   

  

**Key Qualifications.**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or Engineering, or equivalent experience
* 14\\+ years hands\\-on software engineering experience
* 5\\+ years experience as a Principal or Staff Engineer, accountable for multiple engineering teams
* 5\\+ years native cloud engineering experience in a high scale, business critical domain
* Excellent computer science fundamentals including algorithms, data structures, and modern cloud native design patterns
* Hands\\-on experience implementing Gen AI and working knowledge of Gen AI design patterns
* Deep experience with distributed cloud systems tech (Java/node.js, EC2, Lambda, DynamoDB, Elasticsearch, or Google Cloud/Azure equivalents)
* Experience with front\\-end web application tech (javascript, CSS, html5, Vue, React/redux)
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, both technical and business\\-facing
* Ability to build and maintain relationships with multiple senior stakeholders
* Domain experience in product creation, design, innovation or manufacturing is a major plus
* Ability to pass a seven year background investigation


**What You Will Work On**
 If this is you, you’ll be working on the Product Creation team and be one of the primary technical leaders on one of Nike’s emerging technology platforms. In a typical week, half of your time will be spent leading by example to design, develop, operate, and integrate Nike and partner platforms and applications. The other half will be leadership responsibilities to drive technical priorities, define engineering best practices, collaborate with peers, and help to translate business problems into technical solutions.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Designing, developing, and integrating scalable platforms and applications.
* Operating systems to ensure reliability and seamless performance.
* Driving technical priorities and establishing engineering best practices.
* Collaborating with peers and cross\\-functional teams to align technical execution with business needs.
* Translating complex business challenges into actionable technical solutions.
* Providing technical leadership and mentorship to foster innovation, accountability, and growth.

title: Principal Software Engineer
description:
At Aristocrat, we are exceptionally committed to bringing happiness to life through the power of play! As a Principal Software Engineer, you will play a significant role in our Agile/Scrum\\-based software development team, driving the creation of world\\-class games. This is an outstanding opportunity to join a highly ambitious team where your technical leadership will blend seamlessly with practical execution.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with engineers on complex game development projects, bringing deep expertise in C\\+\\+, Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP), and the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). Your contributions will be crucial in crafting, building, and delivering high\\-quality, robust, and high\\-performing games for current and emerging markets within timelines. This role requires strong ownership throughout the full project lifecycle, including estimation, planning, tracking, and proactive dependency management to ensure timely delivery at every achievement.
   

  

 What You'll Do
 * Build and develop scalable game features and a full application using Advanced C\\+\\+ (11/14\\) and OOAD principles.
* Ensure high\\-quality, maintainable, and performant code through thorough reviews and optimization.
* Collaborate with multi\\-functional teams, including engineers, artists, designers, and mathematicians.
* Drive timely delivery of game achievements through detailed planning and proactive issue resolution.
* Lead build/code reviews/audit of multiple games, resolve bugs efficiently, and minimize rework.
* Contribute to continuous integration and maintain development guidelines.
* Mentor teams on guidelines in architecture, debugging, profiling, optimization, and code quality.
* Ensure games meet technical quality targets for stability, performance, memory, and compliance.


 What We're Looking For
 * Solid understanding of Object\\-Oriented Analysis and Build (OOAB).
* Strong background in modern C\\+\\+ (11/14\\) standards.
* Proficiency in Linux and Windows development \\& debugging.
* Hands\\-on experience with Visual Studio, SVN/GitHub, GDB, memory profiling, and static/dynamic code analysis tools.
* Familiarity with continuous integration systems.
* Experience with Agile methodology and capability to engage throughout the entire application lifecycle.
* Excellent analytical, problem\\-solving, and organizational skills.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills; ability to collaborate effectively within a group.
* Demonstrated ability to mentor and share knowledge within the team.
* Align with studio leadership on production timelines, risks, and technical feasibility.


**Qualifications** 
* Bachelor’s Degree or Master’s Degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science/Engineering or related field
* 10\\+ years of professional software engineering experience
* Gaming Industry Experience is preferable.


 Join us at Aristocrat and be part of a team that efficiently implements magnificent solutions in the gaming industry. Your role will be pivotal in our journey to deliver outstanding gaming experiences!
   

  

 Why Aristocrat?
   

  

 Aristocrat is a world leader in gaming content and technology, and a top\\-tier publisher of free\\-to\\-play mobile games. We deliver great performance for our B2B customers and bring joy to the lives of the millions of people who love to play our casino and mobile games. And while we focus on fun, we never forget our responsibilities. We strive to lead the way in responsible gameplay, and to lift the bar in company governance, employee wellbeing and sustainability. We’re a diverse business united by shared values and an inspiring mission to bring joy to life through the power of play.
   

  

 We aim to create an environment where individual differences are valued, and all employees have the opportunity to realize their potential. We welcome and encourage applications from all people regardless of age, gender, race, ethnicity, cultural background, disability status or LGBTQ\\+ identity. EEO M/F/D/V
 * World Leader in Gaming Entertainment
* Robust benefits package
* Global career opportunities


 Our Values
 * All about the Player
* Talent Unleashed
* Collective Brilliance
* Good Business Good Citizen


**Travel Expectations**
 None
   

  

**Additional Information**
*At this time, we are unable to sponsor work visas for this position. Candidates must be authorized to work in the job posting location for this position on a full\\-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship.*

title: Software Engineer- Production Support-AI/ML
description:
Position Description
   

  

 Company Profile:
   

  

 Founded in 1976, CGI is among the largest independent IT and business consulting services firms in the world. With 94,000 consultants and professionals across the globe, CGI delivers an end\\-to\\-end portfolio of capabilities, from strategic IT and business consulting to systems integration, managed IT and business process services and intellectual property solutions. CGI works with clients through a local relationship model complemented by a global delivery network that helps clients digitally transform their organizations and accelerate results. CGI Fiscal 2024 reported revenue is CA$14\\.68 billion and CGI shares are listed on the TSX (GIB.A) and the NYSE (GIB). Learn more at cgi.com.
   

  

 Position: Software Engineer\\- Production Support\\-AI/ML
   

  

 Experience: 2\\-4 years

 Shift: Rotational shifts
   

  

 Location: Bangalore/Hyderabad
   

  

 Position ID: J0526\\-2089
   

  

 Employment Type: Full Time
   

  

 Education Qualification: Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field or higher with minimum 2 years of relevant experience.
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 We are looking for an experienced Production support Engg to join our team. The ideal candidate should be passionate about coding and developing scalable and high\\-performance applications. You will work closely with our front\\-end developers, designers, and other members of the team to deliver quality solutions that meet the needs of our clients.
   

  

**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
 Must\\-Have Skills:
   

  

 Overall, 2\\+ years of experience in Application Production Support or AI\\-enabled support environments.
   

  

 Handle batch jobs, scheduling, model execution failures, and data pipeline issues.
   

  

 Support deployment, maintenance, and monitoring in production environments.
   

  

 Exposure to Generative AI, LLM\\-based applications, or AI assistant tools.
   

  

 Scripting experience in Python.
   

  

 Agentic AI
   

  

 Gemini Enterprise

 Good\\-to\\-Have Skills:

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well\\-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: F5 Engineer – Foundational Services
description:
**Company Description** 




 EduRun Group specializes in delivering customized IT services and consulting solutions that drive business growth through innovation and strategic technology management. With a focus on creating cutting\\-edge software solutions, EduRun Group aims to enhance digital experiences and empower clients for success in the ever\\-evolving digital landscape. The company's mission centers on enabling clients to bring exceptional products to the market while achieving measurable growth. Guided by innovation, creativity, and commitment, EduRun Group strives to set new industry standards and build impactful digital solutions.
 



 We are looking for an experienced F5 Engineer to manage and support enterprise load balancing infrastructure within the Foundational Services team. The role involves day\\-to\\-day F5 administration, VIP management, SSL/TLS configuration, application onboarding, migration activities, troubleshooting, and operational support in a large\\-scale production environment.
 



**Responsibilities:** 



* Perform day\\-to\\-day administration and operational support of F5 BIG\\-IP infrastructure.
* Manage Virtual Servers (VIPs), Pools, Nodes, iRules, monitors, and traffic policies.
* Configure and maintain SSL/TLS certificates, profiles, and secure communication channels.
* Support application onboarding activities on F5 load balancers.
* Handle migration activities, including application traffic migration and configuration transition.
* Monitor load balancer health, traffic flow, and performance optimization.
* Troubleshoot Layer 4–7 networking and application delivery issues.
* Work closely with application, infrastructure, security, and network teams for deployments and issue resolution.
* Perform change implementation, patching, upgrades, and configuration backup activities.
* Ensure compliance with operational standards, security policies, and documentation practices.
* Participate in incident management, root cause analysis, and production support activities.
* Support high availability, disaster recovery, and failover configurations.



**Required Skills:** 



* Strong experience with F5 BIG\\-IP LTM administration.
* Hands\\-on expertise in VIP creation and traffic management.
* Good understanding of SSL/TLS concepts and certificate management.
* Experience with application onboarding and migration support.
* Knowledge of DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, TCP/IP, and networking fundamentals.
* Experience in troubleshooting production incidents and performance issues.
* Familiarity with ITIL processes and change management.
* Good communication and coordination skills.

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.

We are a leader in developing state\\-of\\-the\\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 Do you want to work an industrial grade software solution powering real time manufacturing intelligence on factory floors worldwide?
   

  

 As a Developer on our Shotscope™ team, you will help build and maintain industrial\\-grade manufacturing intelligence software used by customers worldwide. You will implement features and components on a .NET and Azure\\-based full stack, contribute clean and reliable code, and support the continuous evolution of a mission\\-critical product that connects machines, processes, and data.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a motivated engineer who enjoys hands\\-on development, learning from experienced teammates, and seeing their work deployed in real production environments—with clear opportunities to grow toward senior and lead roles.
   

  

 If you want your code to have visible impact on how factories operate, Shotscope™ is where software meets the real world.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
**Technical Implementation**
* Implement software components and features based on provided designs, specifications, and guidance.
* Contribute to the development of reliable, maintainable, and secure code within the assigned scope.
* Apply agreed coding standards, patterns, and best practices in daily development work.

**Delivery \\& Execution Excellence**
* Translate assigned requirements and tasks into working software.
* Complete development work in alignment with sprint goals and delivery commitments.
* Contribute to task breakdowns and effort estimates for assigned work.
* Proactively raise risks, blockers, or implementation issues to the team.


**Quality, Standards \\& Engineering Practices**
* Write clean, testable code and contribute to unit and integration tests.
* Participate in code reviews, incorporating feedback and learning from peers.
* Ensure individual contributions meet Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) criteria.
* Follow established DevOps, security, and quality practices.


**Incident \\& Operational Support**
* Assist in troubleshooting defects and issues in development and production environments.
* Support corrective (bug fixes) and evolutive (enhancements) maintenance of existing solutions.


**Collaboration \\& Growth**
* Collaborate effectively with other developers, QA, Product Owners, and Tech Leads.
* Seeking feedback and guidance to continuously improve technical skills.
* Actively learn the systems, tools, and technologies used by the team.
* Contribute positively to team culture and shared ownership of outcomes.


****Qualifications****
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 4\\+ years’ professional experience in software development.
* Proficiency in .NET technologies (C\\#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, .NET Framework, Entity Framework).
* Strong grasp of Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, application security and version control systems (e.g., Azure DevOps).
* Proficiency in modern front\\-end frameworks (e.g., preference: React; Angular).
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test\\-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.


**Assets**
* Familiarity with CI/CD and pipelines.
* Experience using AI‑assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, with experience in leveraging key services (e.g., Azure App Services, Azure Functions).
* Exposure to Microsoft SQL Server BI stack, including SSAS (OLAP cube design), SSRS (report development), and SSIS (ETL processes and data integration).


**Why Husky?**
* Regulated Working Hours: Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\\-being.
* Visible Impact: Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
* Strategic Influence: Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
* Empowered Involvement: Take an active role in decision\\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
* Valued Contributions: Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
* Impactful Role: Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
* Cutting\\-Edge Projects: Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.
* Supportive Community: Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.
* Collaborative Environment: Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.
